LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.0.descripti: I feel a pleasant warmth spreading through my body. This is quite nice.
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.0.label: pleasant warmth
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.1.descripti: I can't stop giggling! Everything seems so funny right now.
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.1.label: giggly
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.2.descripti: I feel tipsy and joyful! Everything seems more fun!
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.2.label: joyfully tipsy
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.3.descripti: I'm euphoric and having the time of my life! This is amazing!
LanguageData.FB_InebriatedFunSpore.stages.3.label: euphoric
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastColonyPresence.stages.0.des: The colony's beasts move through the shared flesh. Their presence is small, but the rhythm is already comforting.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastColonyPresence.stages.1.des: The colony has grown enough bodies to feel like a living crowd around me. I am not alone inside the flesh.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastColonyPresence.stages.2.des: The colony is dense with living beasts. Their weight presses through the shared mind and steadies my thoughts.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastColonyPresence.stages.3.des: The colony is vast, warm, and close. Every beast is another pulse in the same body, and I rest inside it.
LanguageData.FB_AteFleshBiomass.stages.0.description: I ate a warm mass of unfamiliar living tissue. It was nourishing, but I would rather not know what was moving inside it.
LanguageData.FB_AteFleshBiomass.stages.0.label: ate strange biomass
